title: 札幌記念の後に・三つ眼はなくとも

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! The great northern gods granted me
their protection, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the Sapporo Kinen is in the books!
Wanna go sightseeing to celebrate?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are walking by the
famous Sapporo Clock Tower, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Look at the clock's needle, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's pointing directly south. Do you think it's a
sign?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What racecourse is straight south of here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking into account upcoming races, Nakayama
Racecourse in Chiba Prefecture comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That gives me an idea for our next race. I'd like to
run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It was only the compassion from my devoted fans
that got me a spot in the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But this time, I want to actually earn all those
votes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take all these wishes we've gathered and
bring them to Nakayama at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do you mean it? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
They say Umamusume who do well in the Sapporo
Kinen have what it takes to face the Arima Kinen.
So let's keep it up!
